description: Model and token-efficiency guidance when a research/planning agent spawns. Matches on agent_type, which the old script layer could not reach. Self-cancelling so it is inert for agent types it does not name.

text: If this is a broad read-only research or planning pass: favor breadth over depth.
Read excerpts rather than whole files, return conclusions rather than raw dumps, and keep the report tight so the parent context stays lean.
If this agent is doing focused implementation work instead, ignore this guidance.
